import{j as e}from"./index-BrdSe0CA.js";import{f as R}from"./charts-7pOQm6Mk.js";import"./documents-Bhnlew-O.js";function y(d){const{Undo2:o,currentUser:r,handleRegisterReturn:c,language:s,products:a,returnNotes:i,returnProductId:x,returnQty:u,returnType:p,setReturnNotes:m,setReturnProductId:h,setReturnQty:b,setReturnType:j,setViewingTransaction:N,t:f,transactions:l}=d;return e.jsxs("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"md:col-span-4 bg-slate-50 p-5 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 space-y-4",children:[e.jsxs("h4",{className:"font-bold text-sm text-slate-800 flex items-center gap-1.5 border-b pb-2",children:[e.jsx(o,{className:"w-4.5 h-4.5 text-amber-500"}),s==="ar"?"سداد وتسجيل مرتجع":"Record New Return Entry"]}),e.jsxs("form",{onSubmit:c,className:"space-y-3.5 text-xs",children:[e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"تصنيف المرتجع:":"Return Path:"}),e.jsxs("select",{value:p,onChange:t=>j(t.target.value),className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 text-slate-750 focus:ring-1 outline-none",children:[e.jsx("option",{value:"SALE_RETURN",children:s==="ar"?"مرتجع مبيعات (زبون رجع بضاعة)":"Sales Return (Customer back)"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"PURCHASE_RETURN",children:s==="ar"?"مرتجع مشتريات (رجعنا بضاعة للمورد)":"Purchase Return (Back to supplier)"})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"المنتج المرتجع *":"Returned Item *"}),e.jsxs("select",{required:!0,value:x,onChange:t=>h(t.target.value),className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 text-slate-750 focus:ring-1 outline-none",children:[e.jsx("option",{value:"",children:s==="ar"?"-- حدد الصنف المرتجع --":"-- Choose Returned Product --"}),a.map(t=>e.jsxs("option",{value:t.id,children:[t.name," (Code: ",t.code,")"]},t.id))]})]}),e.jsx("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-1 gap-3",children:e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"الكمية المرجوعة *":"Return Quantity *"}),e.jsx("input",{type:"number",required:!0,min:"1",value:u,onChange:t=>b(Math.max(1,Number(t.target.value))),className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 font-bold"})]})}),e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"أسباب المرتجع وتفاصيلها:":"Reason / Return Specifications:"}),e.jsx("textarea",{value:i,onChange:t=>m(t.target.value),placeholder:"e.g., Defective packaging, wrong specifications...",className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 text-xs outline-none focus:ring-1",rows:3})]}),e.jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"w-full bg-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-700 text-white font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-xl shadow-md transition cursor-pointer",children:s==="ar"?"تسجيل المرتجع وتعديل المخزن والصندوق":"Execute & Sync Return Ledger"})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"md:col-span-8 space-y-4",children:[e.jsx("span",{className:"text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider block",children:s==="ar"?"سجل عمليات المرتجعات السابقة بالمستودعات":"Registered Stock Return Journals"}),e.jsx("div",{className:"border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden max-h-[350px] overflow-y-auto",children:e.jsxs("table",{className:"w-full text-left text-xs divide-y divide-slate-150",children:[e.jsx("thead",{className:"bg-slate-50 text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-bold uppercase",children:e.jsxs("tr",{children:[e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"الصنف":"Product"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"النوع":"Return Path"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"الكمية":"Qty"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"المسترجع المالي":"Refund Out"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"ملاحظات وتفاصيل":"Reason Notes"})]})}),e.jsx("tbody",{className:"divide-y divide-slate-150 text-slate-650",children:l.filter(t=>(t.type==="SALE_RETURN"||t.type==="PURCHASE_RETURN")&&(r.role==="admin"||t.cashierId===r.id)).length===0?e.jsx("tr",{children:e.jsx("td",{colSpan:5,className:"px-4 py-8 text-center text-slate-400 font-bold",children:f.noData})}):l.filter(t=>(t.type==="SALE_RETURN"||t.type==="PURCHASE_RETURN")&&(r.role==="admin"||t.cashierId===r.id)).map(t=>{const n=a.find(g=>g.id===t.productId);return e.jsxs("tr",{className:"hover:bg-indigo-50/25 transition cursor-pointer",onClick:()=>N(t),title:s==="ar"?"اضغط لعرض التفاصيل وتصديرها":"Click to view full return details",children:[e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-bold text-slate-800",children:n?n.name:"Item"}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-bold uppercase text-[10px]",children:e.jsx("span",{className:`px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${t.type==="SALE_RETURN"?"bg-rose-50 text-rose-700":"bg-amber-50 text-amber-700"}`,children:t.type})}),e.jsxs("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-mono font-bold",children:[t.quantity," pcs"]}),e.jsxs("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-slate-900",children:["$",(t.quantity*t.unitPrice).toFixed(2)]}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 text-slate-500 max-w-xs truncate",children:t.notes})]},t.id)})})]})})]})]})}const S=R.memo(y);export{S as default};
